content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_PurchaseOrders
-- DROP VIEW BI_PurchaseOrders

AS

SELECT
    POL.PUNO AS [PO Number],
    POL.PNLI AS [PO Line],
    POL.PNLS AS [PO Line Subnumber],
    POL.PUSL AS [PO Line Status],
    CASE
        WHEN POL.PUSL BETWEEN 46 AND 90 THEN 'Received'
		ELSE 'Open'
    END AS [PO Status],
    POL.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    POL.ORQA AS [Order Qty],
	POL.RVQA AS [Received Qty],
    TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POL.RCDT)) AS [Last Received Date],
    POL.PUPR AS [Price],
	POL.LNAM AS [Total Amt],
    POL.WHLO AS [Final Warehouse],
    POL.PLDT AS [Planning Date],
    POL.SUDO AS [Container Number],

    POH.RGDT AS [Order Date],
    POH.DWDT AS [Factory Ready Date],
	POH.BUYE AS [Buyer],
    POH.SUNO AS [Supplier],
	POH.TEPY AS [Terms],
    POH.TEDL AS [Delivery Terms],
    POH.UCA2 AS [Origin Port Name],
    POH.UCA3 AS [Discharge Port Name],
	CASE
        WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES DISCHG PORT' THEN 'ARRIVES AT DISCHARGE PORT'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'ARRIVES WAREHOUSE' THEN 'ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES WAR' THEN 'DOMESTIC ARRIVES AT WAREHOUSE'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'EX WORKS' THEN 'EX WORKS'
		WHEN POH.UCA4 = 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT' THEN 'LEAVES ORIGIN PORT'
		ELSE 'UNDEFINED'
    END AS [Product Receipt Type],
	POH.UCA5 AS [Final Destination],
	TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POH.UID1)) AS [ETA/ETD Date],
	POH.YRE1 AS [Reference Number],

    TRY_CONVERT(date, TRY_CONVERT(varchar(10), POD.ARDT)) AS [Arrival Date]

FROM M3.MPLINE POL

LEFT JOIN M3.MPHEAD POH ON POL.PUNO = POH.PUNO
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        PUNO,
        PNLI,
        PNLS,
        PUOS,
        ARDT
    FROM M3.MPLIND
    WHERE PUOS = '45') POD
ON POL.PUNO = POD.PUNO AND POL.PNLI = POD.PNLI AND POL.PNLS = POD.PNLS

WHERE
    POL.FACI = 'TLC' AND
    POL.PUSL BETWEEN 15 AND 90 AND
    POH.ORTY <> 'C01'
